since_last: 58% of 86 AI names green; Chip Equipment & AI Hardware leads +0.63%; AI bubble risk 57 Heating Up.

cards.headline: The tape: a broad bid, 58% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX +0.41% · BTC -2.47% · Gold -2.12% · Nasdaq100 +0.40%. 58% of 86 AI names are green — a broad bid. Chip Equipment & AI Hardware is doing the heavy lifting at +0.63%.

cards.headline: Chip Equipment & AI Hardware leads, Data Center, Power & Energy lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is Chip Equipment & AI Hardware at +0.63%; weakest is Data Center, Power & Energy at -0.86%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: OKLO is the standout at -4.60%
cards.body: Leaders: UPST +4.40%, ZBRA +3.48%, PUBM +2.86%, WDAY +2.76%, ZS +2.74%. Laggards: OKLO -4.60%, OKLO -4.60%, SMR -4.37%, QCOM -3.69%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) +0.71% at $157.23
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is +0.71% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 57 — Heating Up
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 57/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
